title: 20251223_Press_release_49_BCA
text:
City Atrium T +32 2 277 52 72 info@bma-abc.be 
Rue du Progrès 50 http://www.belgiancompetition.be 
1210 Brussels 

PRESS RELEASE 
N° 49/2025 
23 December 2025 

The Belgian Competition Authority approves the acquisition of sole control of IFW Globe by Sofindev 
 
On 22 December 2025, the Belgian Competition Authority ( “BCA”) approved the transaction of sole control of 
IFW Globe by Sofindev VI. 
The concentration was notified on 16 December 2025 and the application of the simplified procedure was 
requested. 
Sofindev VI is an investment company speciali sed in private equity investments in the equity of small and 
medium-sized companies in the Benelux. Sofindev has built up experience in various sectors such as digital 
driven business services, service and trading companies that form a link in the logistics and supply chain of 
various sectors (food, pharmaceutical, construction, etc.) and niche companies in the manufacturing industry. 
IFW Globe is a holding company that directly holds 100% of the shares of Shipex NV and VDH Forwarding BV. 
Shipex and VDH Forwarding, as freight forwarders, organise freight transport for import and export. 
In its decision of 22 December 2025, the B CA found that the conditions for the application of the simplified 
procedure were met and that the notified concentration did not raise objections. 
 
For more information you may contact: 
Damien Gerard 
Prosecutor General 
Tel: +32 (2) 277 76 57 
E-mail: damien.gerard@bma-abc.be 

The Belgian Competition Authority (BCA) is an independent administrative authority that contributes to the definition and 
implementation of competition policy in Belgium. Concretely, the BCA pursues anti -competitive practices, such as cartels 
and abuses of a dominant position, and reviews the main merger operations. The BCA cooperates with the other 
competition authorities of the member states of the European Union and the European Commission within the European 
Competition Network (ECN)
